info.name: TimeNest API
info.description: TimeNest Enterprise SaaS Platform API Collection - Production-Grade documentation covering authentication, 2FA workflows, tenant switching, global platform administration, and tenant-scoped corporation entities.

item.name: Auth
item.description: Authentication endpoints for user registration, multi-factor validation, token rotation, and workspace context selection.

request.description: Create a new user account.
Authenticate user with email and password.
Verify user account's email using the 64-character verification token.
Submit a refresh token to rotate credentials.
Fetch active authenticated profile details.
Change password for the logged-in user.
Logout the user session and blacklist tokens.
Logout globally from all devices.
Fetch all available corporate workspaces that the user belongs to.
Switch corporation workspace context.
Select corporation workspace with temporary token.
Submit 2FA verification code.
Initiate Google OAuth redirect flow.
Handle Google OAuth callback.

item.name: Public Invitations
item.description: Public endpoints to validate and accept corporation invitations.

request.description: Validate the raw invitation token before proceeding to registration or login.
Accept invitation. Registers new user, or associates workspace if user already exists.

item.name: Platform - Corporations
item.description: Global administration routes to manage workspace corporations.

request.description: Retrieve a list of all registered corporations.

body.raw:
{
    "legal_name": "Acme Technologies Private Limited",
    "trading_name": "Acme Tech",
    "legal_entity_type": "Private Limited",
    "industry": "Software & Information Technology Services",
    "company_size": "50-100",
    "email": "corporate@acme-tech.com",
    "phone": "+919876543210",
    "timezone": "Asia/Kolkata",
    "locale": "en",
    "currency_code": "INR",
    "plan": "enterprise",
    "max_users": 250,
    "country_id": 1,
    "hq_name": "Acme headquarters",
    "hq_code": "HQ-KOL-01"
}

request.description: Register a new corporation workspace.
Fetch details of a specific corporation by its UUID.

request.description: Update specific configuration properties of a corporation by UUID.

item.name: Corporation
item.description: Tenant-scoped routes for managing branch entities, departments, staff, policies, and attendance operations.

item.name: Memberships
item.description: Manage user accounts, roles, and profiles within a corporation.

header.description: Dynamic workspace fallback resolution header for AppOwner role bypass

header.description: Dynamic workspace fallback resolution header for AppOwner role bypass

request.description: Link a registered user account to this corporation with dynamic workspace roles.

request.description: Deactivate / suspend a user membership under the corporation by UUID.

item.name: Invitations
item.description: Manage corporate tenant invitations for onboarding new employees or admins.

request.description: Retrieve corporate invitations with status/email filters.
Retrieve details of a specific invitation by UUID.
Create and send invitation email to a user.
Revoke a pending corporate invitation.
Generate a new token, reset expiry, and resend the invitation email.

item.name: Attendance
item.description: Manage employee attendance sessions, leaves, adjustments, worklogs, and compliance policies.

item.name: Clocking & Summaries
item.description: Clock in, clock out, and summary endpoints.

request.description: Clock in for the day.
Clock out for the day.
Retrieve today's attendance stats.
Fetch paginated historical attendance days.

item.name: Leaves
item.description: Apply for leaves and manage state transitions.

request.description: List requested leaves.
Apply for casual, sick, WFH, or EWD leaves.
Retrieve leave request details by UUID.
Transition leave request status.

item.name: Adjustments
item.description: Submit corrections for incorrect or missing clocking records.

request.description: List adjustment requests.
Submit correction request.
Approve correction request (manager only).
Reject correction request (manager only).

item.name: Policy
item.description: Retrieve and update corporate shifts and grace periods.

request.description: Get active policy.
Update attendance policy.

item.name: Worklogs
item.description: Manage active task-level worklogs and submit them for review.

request.description: List logged productivity minutes.
Create a worklog segment.
Retrieve details of a single worklog.
Update worklog parameters.
Transition the workflow status of a worklog.
Delete draft worklog.

item.name: Worklog Policy
item.description: Get and update productivity compliance configurations.

request.description: Get current worklog policy.

body.raw:
{
    "require_worklog_on_clockout": true,
    "allow_deferred_submission": true,
    "require_project_mapping": true,
    "require_task_mapping": false,
    "require_justification_on_overflow": true,
    "auto_escalate_overdue_logs": true,
    "overdue_after_days": 1,
    "lock_after_days": 7,
    "allow_multiple_worklogs_per_session": true,
    "strict_mode_enabled": false,
    "flexible_mode_enabled": true,
    "hybrid_mode_enabled": false
}

request.description: Update worklog policy.

item.name: Escalations
item.description: View and resolve automated compliance escalations.

request.description: Get compliance escalations list.
Retrieve escalation details.
Resolve or dismiss escalation.
